title: Kyros Takes the Sunflower Field
description: Pages 6–10 focus on kyros takes the sunflower field, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as luffy and Law break through toward the palace, while Cavendish, Kyros, and the allies hold back Doflamingo's forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: For my Nakama to disappear and for me to not even be aware of that fact...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Sorry, I ain't gonna let that happen! I'll stop her at any and all costs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Be that as it may, this distance is simply far too great to attempt any feat of marks- manship! It is all but impossible!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The Palace is so far away that only now was I even able to finally visually confirm its existence!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: On top of that, our enemy is within its walls! We cannot even see her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They aren't even picking up their den den den den den den den den den den den den men mushi. We don't have any more time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I am a sniper, being a backup is where I shine brightest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: UNSEEN ...UNHEARD...I SHOOT DOWN MY ENEMIES WHILE PROTECTING MY NAKAMA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Then, is there any way in which we may be of help!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Yet still I wonder, what do you intend to do by shooting such a thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Captain tank! Hack! lend me your aid!

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: The people have drawn quite close...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: I'm sure they're quite confused by recent events. They might even be after my own head.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: But we must not harm them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: We need only buy time for usopp to get a clear shot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: King Gramps! I owe you one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Sugar is drawing closer to the two of them! She's already on the same floor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Keep your eyes on her! I'm gonna be relying on that Senrigan of yours!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: capture all of them and hand them over to Dofla- Mingo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: We, too, shall aid in crowd control!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: No one is going to run! Every- one, please, stop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Tell me exactly where the garden is located!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: Can you see the Windows in the top half of the outer ramparts?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: From the window just to the right of the center one you should be able to see straw hat and the others.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: How many bars are in that grate?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: It's approximately 4 feet from the garden to the lower part of the window.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Sugar's height is about the same as well!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: How wide are the spaces in the lower part of the gratee?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Sugar's right in front of them! She's drawing nearer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: My target is on the other side of these walls.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: Oi, Luffy! I ain't about to sail a sea that doesn't have you on it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: "I'm not gonna let any of you have your way!

summary: Kyros Takes the Sunflower Field develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
